case_title: BELCHER, INGE SUE vs. LEDESMA, CLARA et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELCHER, INGE SUE SERVED MAR-24-1994, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELCHER, INGE SUE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEDESMA, CLARA

JUDGE GEORGE G TYLER. DAVID S EISENMANN, FOR THE PLTF. CLARA LEDESMA, DEFT. 10:06 AM: C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT IN DEPT 03. PLTF AND PLTF'S COUNSEL PRESENT, BUT DEFT NOT PRESENT. PSW&E INGE SUE BELCHER. 10:15 AM: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AGAINST THE DEFT FOR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 1840 BROADWAY #101, SF, CA. WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL BE ISSUED IMMEDIATELY. AS SOON THE DEFT IS EVICTED, THE PLTF WILL FILE FOR THE THE COSTS AND DAMAGES WITH THE COURT. PLTF'S COUNSEL PREPARED THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEDESMA, CLARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1840 BROADWAY #101, SF, CA., SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS. AFTER THE DEFT IS EVICTED THE PLTF WILL FILE WITH THE COURT THE COSTS AND DAMAGES OCCURED.
